query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_topology (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    activity_map_id INT         DEFAULT NULL,
    from_time       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    until_time      BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    node_count      INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    edge_count      INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    KEY idx_st_map (activity_map_id),
    KEY idx_st_time (from_time, until_time),
    KEY fk_st_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_st_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_topology_node (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    topology_id     BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    object_type     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    object_id       INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    ipaddr          VARCHAR(45)  DEFAULT NULL,
    display_name    VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    role            VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    is_external     BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    weight          BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    node_data       JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    KEY idx_stn_topology (topology_id),
    KEY idx_stn_object (object_type, object_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_stn_topology FOREIGN KEY (topology_id) REFERENCES snap_topology(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_topology_edge (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    topology_id     BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    source_node_id  BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
    target_node_id  BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
    protocol        VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    weight          BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    bytes_in        BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    bytes_out       BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    edge_data       JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    KEY idx_ste_topology (topology_id),
    KEY idx_ste_source (source_node_id),
    KEY idx_ste_target (target_node_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ste_topology FOREIGN KEY (topology_id)    REFERENCES snap_topology(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ste_source   FOREIGN KEY (source_node_id) REFERENCES snap_topology_node(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT fk_ste_target   FOREIGN KEY (target_node_id) REFERENCES snap_topology_node(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_topology_node (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    topology_id     BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    object_type     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    object_id       INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    ipaddr          VARCHAR(45)  DEFAULT NULL,
    display_name    VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    role            VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    is_external     BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    weight          BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    node_data       JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    KEY idx_stn_topology (topology_id),
    KEY idx_stn_object (object_type, object_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_stn_topology FOREIGN KEY (topology_id) REFERENCES snap_topology(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_topology_edge (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    topology_id     BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    source_node_id  BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
    target_node_id  BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
    protocol        VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    weight          BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    bytes_in        BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    bytes_out       BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    edge_data       JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    KEY idx_ste_topology (topology_id),
    KEY idx_ste_source (source_node_id),
    KEY idx_ste_target (target_node_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ste_topology FOREIGN KEY (topology_id)    REFERENCES snap_topology(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ste_source   FOREIGN KEY (source_node_id) REFERENCES snap_topology_node(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT fk_ste_target   FOREIGN KEY (target_node_id) REFERENCES snap_topology_node(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
